case_title: WILSON, HENRY vs. ADDAIRE, CHARLES et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILSON, HENRY AS TO DEFENDANT ADDAIRE, CHARLES DOES 1 TO 4 SUMMONS ISSUED

DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT ADDAIRE, CHARLES

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILSON, HENRY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-03-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 07 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAY-10-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

DEPARTMENT #7 LELA A. HARRIS, PRO TEM. PATTY DOWLING REPORTER. C/C FPR SETTLEMENT CONF. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLTF. FOR RESTITUTION, FORFEITURE OF THE LEASE. STAY PHYSICAL EVICTION TO 6/1/93 12:00 P.M. PLTF. RETAINS DEFTS. SECURITY DEPOSIT. PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISE AFTER DEFT. ADDAIRE HAS VACATED TO BE STORED BY PLAINTIFF FOR EIGHTEEN DAYS WITHOUT EXPENSE TO DEFT. PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ADDAIRE, CHARLES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 55 MASON STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94102, LEASE FORFEITED
